title: RNAscope for FFPE Mouse Tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4csk9","text":"This protocol details the RNAscope for FFPE Mouse Tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Spray RNase away on bench top, slide holder, metal container.
Warm oven and slide holder up to 60 °C .
Label the lower part of the slide with a pencil. Can place slides on bench (since sprayed with RNase away).
Put slides into slide holder and place into oven → bake for 01:00:00 @ 60 °C . Meanwhile..
Set hyb oven temp to 40 °C .
Place slides into tissue tek container and transport to fume hood.
Turn plate warmer on to 60 °C .
Make Target Retrieval solution.
Fill Xylene and Ethanol containers. After Baking: Possible stopping point: Store @ Room temperature , good for ~ 168:00:00 .
Wet humidifying paper with nanopure water (does not need to be dripping).
Place paper on bottom of slide tray and put into the oven for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C .
Xylene container 1 for 00:05:00 .
Xylene container 1 for 00:05:00 .
Meanwhile.. Turn on vegetable steamer.
When transferring to container 2 → shake off excess.
When transferring to ethanol → shake off excess.
Absolute ethanol container 1 for 00:02:00 .
When transferring to container 2 → shake off excess.
Absolute ethanol container 2 for 00:02:00 .
Dry on slide warmer for ~ 00:05:00 @ 60 °C until dry.
Meanwhile... clean bench with RNase away.
Place slides on bench top and cover tissue completely with Hydrogen Peroxide (~5-8 drops).
Incubate for 00:10:00 @ Room temperature . Meanwhile.. Boil Target Retrieval solution and a container of Nano pure water in microwave until boiling.
*Microwave for 00:01:00 at a time*
When reaches a boil → place containers in warm steamer to ensure solution is at least 99 °C .
Remove solution using absorbent paper by tapping long side on paper. Place in slide holder.
Wash slides in slide holder with 200 mL of Nano pure water ~3-5 dunks.
Take slides out and repeat step go to step #14 - go to step #15 1x .
Keep in water and transport to steamer.
Dunk a couple times and soak for 00:00:10 in nanopure water (steamer).
Place in target retrieval solution in the steamer for 00:30:00 (for brain samples) or 00:15:00 (for other tissue).
Rinse slides in fresh 200 mL of Nano pure water → 00:00:15 .
Transfer slides to the 2nd container of absolute ethanol in the fume hood → 00:03:00 .
Dry slides in slide warmer - ~ 00:05:00 @ 60 °C . Meanwhile..
Rinse slide holder in DI water in sink and let dry on paper towel.
Spray bench with RNase away.
Put dry slides on bench and square off with hydrophobic pen.
Leave a little extra room at one side of square to allow space to aspirate later.
Apply ~5 drops of protease plus to tissue until sample is completely covered.
Incubate in oven for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C . Meanwhile..
Warm probes @ 40 °C for ~ 00:10:00 .
Create probe solution. C1 probe is at 1X → assign to low expresser gene C2 & C3 probes are at 50 X → dilute w/ C1 probe if using C1 or with probe diluent to 1X
Wash with DI water in wash tray - 2X.
Aspirate with 200 µL pipette tip in the fume hood.
Wipe bottom of wash tray with big kimwipe.
Add ~ 120 µL of probe mix to respective samples → cover sample completely.
Incubate for 02:00:00 @ 40 °C .
Wash in 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes 2X . Store till day 2 in 5X SSC @ Room temperature . Pour ethanol back into reagent bottle if not doing RNAscope within the next week so doesn't evaporate.
Spray RNase away on bench top, slide holder, metal container.
Hydrate Paper and turn on oven to 40 °C .
Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X .
Aspirate.
Hybridize AMP1.
Hybridize AMP2.
Hybridize AMP3.
4-5 drops covering the sample with AMP1.
Incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C .

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2).
Aspirate.
4-5 drops covering the ample with AMP2.
Incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C .

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2).
Aspirate.
4-5 drops covering the sample with AMP3.
Incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C .

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2).
Aspirate.

Don’t need to do all 3 channels for each sample just for respective channels, do one channel at a time/slide. PC and NC need all 3 Channels. Develop 780 channel Last!! Develop HRP-C2 (570 or 690) signal.
Repeat go to step #37 using HRP-C3.
For 780 Channel
Add 4-5 drops covering the sample with HRP-C2 (or respective HRP-C#) and incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Meanwhile.. Dilute Opal dyes → KEEP IN DARK 1 µL Dye (570 or 690) + 1000 µL TSA buffer

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.
Add 1st Opal dye and Incubate for 00:30:00 @ 40 °C .

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.
Add 4-6 drops HRP blocker and incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C .

Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.

Add HRP-C1 and incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.

Add ~ 120 µL of TSA-DIG per section and incubate for 00:30:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.

Add HRP Blocker and incubate for 00:15:00 @ 40 °C . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.

Add ~ 120 µL of Opal 780 per section and incubate for 00:30:00 @ Room temperature . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 2 minutes with slight agitation 2X . Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2). Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2). Aspirate.
Wash w/ PBS 3X . Aspirate.
Apply ~ 120 µL of 1X TrueBlack Plus for 00:10:00 @ Room temperature .
Wash w/ PBS 3X . Aspirate.
Wash in 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 (1/2).
Wash in 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 (2/2).
Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (1/2).
Wash slides with 1X wash buffer for 00:02:00 with slight agitation (2/2).
Add 4-5 drops of DAPI to completely cover section.
Incubate for 00:00:30 @ Room temperature .
Remove DAPI with absorbent paper → tap long side gently to paper.
Add 3-4 drops of Prolong Gold Mountant.
Add Coverslip.
Use a forceps to attach coverslip.
Gently press down.
Kim wipe the bottom of the slide and the bench in between samples.
Store in dark Overnight on absorbent paper (in a drawer). Dry slides in the dark overnight and then Store slides at 4 °C the next day.
creator: Jane Balster
